title: poa remota subsp. chaixii
intro: Poa remota subsp. chaixii, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a subspecies of the Poa remota grass that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Poa remota subsp. chaixii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
